claim: Local repo already contains reusable wave/optics formulas for wave speed, group velocity, interference, diffraction, refraction, polarization angles, numerical aperture, Doppler shift, and beats.
Local repo already contains an optical-transistor simulator with nonlinear cavity maps, bistability, Adler locking, multi-beam gain competition, cascadability verdicts, and null gates.
SCBE already has a provider-neutral photonic accelerator routing simulator that reports fit, precision loss, latency, energy, failure modes, and route decisions.
The Obsidian propagation grammar already maps fiber optics into carrier, excitation, pattern, medium, distortion, coupling, observables, and control fields.
Integrated photonics and thin-film lithium niobate are active, credible technology areas, but product copy should not imply SCBE has measured hardware unless it does.
source: Optica Publishing Group, Advances in Optics and Photonics thin-film lithium niobate review, https://opg.optica.org/aop/abstract.cfm?URI=aop-13-2-242
verified_with: SCBE photonic accelerator lane already marks hardware_claim as simulated

claim: Photonic neural network claims should be routed through precision, calibration, branching, memory, latency, and energy checks rather than presented as universal GPU replacements.
